summary: Verified 2 bug fixes: 1) Mira chat widget messages no longer overlap with header sections (pet selector, product recs, quick actions) - messages have independent scroll. 2) Stay page property cards show proper paw ratings (4.1-4.8) with filled amber icons, not 0.0.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraChatWidget.jsx (line ~1309-1310): Content wrapper uses 'flex flex-col flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-hidden' - correctly isolates scroll areas
MiraChatWidget.jsx (line ~1313, 1340, 1371): Fixed sections have 'shrink-0 flex-none' preventing them from shrinking
MiraChatWidget.jsx (line ~1400-1401): Messages area uses 'flex-1 min-h-0 overflow-y-auto' for independent scrolling
StayPage.jsx (line ~448-464): calculateOverallPawRating function correctly calculates from individual scores (comfort, safety, freedom, care, joy)
StayPage.jsx (line ~466-478): PawRatingDisplay component uses calculated rating and displays amber filled paw icons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs are FIXED: 1) Mira widget messages scroll independently below fixed header sections, 2) Stay page paw ratings show actual values (4.1-4.8) not 0.0

bug_2_paw_ratings_zero.code_location: StayPage.jsx lines 448-478 (calculateOverallPawRating function and PawRatingDisplay component)
